structure.unit: Waters of the State, Ports and Harbors
Additional Upland Conditions for Water Quality Certification

law.catch_line: Requests for public hearing, hearings, and final decisions procedures

text.section: The issuance of a certification pursuant to this article shall be a permit action.
The Department shall assess an administrative charge to the applicant to cover the direct costs of services rendered associated with its responsibilities pursuant to this section.
